blocked_reasons: Qwen3.5-MoE text tower alternates linear_attention and full_attention layers; only full_attention block cache/KV contract is green.
BloomBee KV tuple contract does not yet encode Qwen3.5 linear_attention convolution/state cache, so linear_attention cached serving fails closed.
Outer qwen3_5_moe multimodal/conditional-generation config remains unserved; this slice registers text_tower model_type=qwen3_5_moe_text only.
next_step: Implement/test Qwen3.5 linear-attention cache mapping before any one-block server proof or route promotion.
